generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a veteran, I've seen firsthand how our security agencies keep us safe. The new domestic security measures might seem like an overreach to some, but they're actually about protecting everyday Americans. My neighbor's son, a local cop, told me these tools helped prevent a potential attack last year. We can't afford to be naive about security. #SafetyFirst #SupportOurAgencies
